intent: Add .apple as a 4th color scheme with full CSS token overrides, component radius refactors to CSS custom property hooks, type plumbing, settings UI update, and test coverage.

R1.detail: ColorScheme type includes 'apple', picker shows 4 options

R2.detail: Full .apple and .dark.apple token blocks in theme.css

R3.detail: Apple radius scale (5/8/11/18px) overridden in .apple block

R4.detail: Inter font, 17px base, weight 600 medium in .apple

R9.detail: Radius refactors use CSS vars defaulting to current values

R10.detail: Settings UI shows 4 options in grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4

R11.detail: No hardcoded Tailwind colors in changed files

applied_fixes.title: Store test assertion mismatch after default change
applied_fixes.suggested_fix: Changed expect(state.colorScheme).toBe('professional') to expect(state.colorScheme).toBe('clean') to match the new store default

residual_risks: --radius audit: input-group.tsx calc(var(--radius) - 5px) shrinks to ~6px under Apple's 11px base. Accepted in Round 1 as fitting Apple's tighter inline aesthetic.
